g.text: Add an instrument to the portfolio
Bulk-add instruments from a JSON file
Show detailed info for one instrument
Remove an instrument from the portfolio
Update shares or average price for an instrument
Refresh live data from Yahoo Finance
show this help message and exit
show program's version number and exit
Show detailed refresh progress at startup
Force a full refresh of all instruments on startup, even if already refreshed today
Set up or update Lynx configuration (database directory, etc.).
Set the default interface mode (console, interactive, tui, gui). Saved to config for future
Use a temporary empty database. Nothing is persisted.
Use the configured persistent database (run --configure first).
Bulk-add instruments from a JSON file (works without -c/-i/-tui)
Default exchange suffix for --import (e.g. SW, DE, V, TO); overridden per-entry by the
Re-fetch live data for every portfolio instrument
Auto-refresh cache in background every SECONDS seconds
Encrypt the portfolio database with a password vault
Decrypt and remove encryption from the database
Open encrypted vault (prompts for password if none given)
Restore database from the most recent backup
lynx-portfolio --configure set up the database directory
run modes (default: production — wizard runs automatically on first use):
--devel fresh empty DB every run, nothing persisted
lynx-portfolio auto-detects encrypted DB and prompts
lynx-portfolio --restore restore from most recent backup
